Practitioner.title: Practitioner
Practitioner.description: Represents a medical practitioner in the DocTrust application, including their professional details and verification status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Practitioner entity.

name.description: The full name of the practitioner.

specialization.description: The medical specialization of the practitioner (e.g., 'Cardiologist', 'Pediatrician').

medicalRegistrationNumber.description: The unique medical registration number or identifier for the practitioner, used for verification against official lists.

verifiedStatus.description: The current verification status of the practitioner. Possible states: 'UNVERIFIED', 'PENDING_REVIEW', 'MANUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED', 'VERIFIED'.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the practitioner's primary location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the practitioner's primary location.

certificateUrl.description: URL to the practitioner's uploaded medical certificate.

patientId.description: The UID of the patient (anonymous or registered).

date.description: The scheduled date and time of the appointment.

firestore.reasoning: Standard collection structure for practitioners and appointments. Appointments are tracked by a unique ID and link patients to practitioners via UIDs.
